examples: I finally got through this homework assignment

meanings.definition: spend or pass, as with boredom or in a pleasant manner; of time
succeed in reaching a real or abstract destination after overcoming problems
examples: We finally got through the bureaucracy and could talk to the Minister

meanings.definition: be in or establish communication with
examples: He never contacted his children after he emigrated to Australia

meanings.definition: become clear or enter one's consciousness or emotions
examples: It dawned on him that she had betrayed him
